creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed with minor changes, thanks! (Reverted overzealous plist sub)

For the future, you no longer need to attach your test logs. Just say what you tested with and what the outcomes were, e.g.:

Portlint -Cg: OK
Poudriere:
  FreeBSD 10.3 i386: OK
  FreeBSD 11.0 amd64: OK
